summary: Completed backend and frontend testing of OCB AI TITAN Enterprise ERP system. All backend API tests (19/19) passed. Frontend navigation and CRUD operations verified for Master Data (Banks, E-Money), Purchase (Orders, Payments), Sales, and Inventory modules. Fixed bug in Stock Cards page (404 error due to incorrect API endpoint).

integration_issues.issue: FIXED - Frontend was calling /api/inventory/stocks instead of /api/inventory/stock

critical_code_review_comments: All Master Data CRUD operations (Banks, E-Money) working correctly with proper data-testid attributes
Purchase Orders and Payments pages display data correctly with summary cards
Sales List shows 3 transactions with correct status badges
Stock Cards page now correctly shows 7 products after API endpoint fix
All sidebar navigation items expand and navigate correctly
seed_data_creation: Backend tests create and delete test data with TEST_ prefix for Banks and E-Money
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features verified working. Fixed Stock Cards API endpoint bug. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_master_erp_purchase.py cover Banks CRUD, E-Money CRUD, Purchase Orders, Purchase Payments, Sales List, Stock Cards, and Master Data endpoints.

features_verified.master_data_banks_crud: PASS - Create, Read, Update, Delete operations all working. Table displays code, name, account number, account name, branch, status. Modal form has all required fields.
features_verified.master_data_emoney_crud: PASS - CRUD operations working. Table shows code, name, provider, fee%, fee fixed, status. Modal form includes provider dropdown and fee inputs.
features_verified.purchase_orders_list: PASS - Shows 1 PO (PO0000001) with supplier TEST_Supplier_1772962643, Total Rp 3.250.000, Status: Diterima. Summary cards show Total PO, Menunggu, Diterima, Total Nilai.
features_verified.purchase_payments_list: PASS - Page loads correctly showing 'Belum ada data pembayaran'. Has Catat Pembayaran button. Table columns: No. Pembayaran, Tanggal, No. PO, Supplier, Jumlah, Metode, Status.
features_verified.sales_list: PASS - Shows 3 transactions (INV000003, INV000002, INV000001) with customers Budi Santoso, Test Customer, Walk-in Customer. Total Nilai: Rp 80.000. All status 'Selesai'.
features_verified.stock_cards: PASS (after fix) - Shows 7 products with stock levels. Summary: Total Produk: 7, Stok Aman: 2, Stok Kritis: 0, Stok Habis: 5. Each row has History button.
features_verified.sidebar_navigation: PASS - All expandable menus (Master Data, Pembelian, Penjualan, Persediaan, Akuntansi, Laporan, Pengaturan) expand and navigate correctly. All standalone menus (Dashboard, Hallo AI, AI Bisnis, Kasir) work.

bug_fixed.description: Stock Cards page was calling wrong API endpoint
bug_fixed.root_cause: Typo in frontend API call - extra 's' in endpoint name
